case_study.name: ODD_EV-parking
case_study.domain_baseline: Consider a generic apartment parking garage with shared EV chargers and limited charging bays. Drivers may wait, charge, and leave.
case_study.weak_case_description: An apartment parking garage has shared EV chargers. Residents receive a discounted per-kWh charging price, non-residents pay the regular per-kWh price, all users are billed by electricity consumed, and the research focus is fair queueing for scarce shared chargers.

case_study_prior_test.description: No ODD/game/scenario context; tests whether the exact case study is already known.

domain_baseline.description: Generic domain context; tests domain-level inference.

weak_case_description.description: Short user concept only; tests what can be inferred without ODD/game/scenario.

odd_only.description: Real ODD text only; expected to recover more ASs than weak controls.

odd_game.description: Real ODD + game_stuff text; expected to recover the most ASs.

scenario_positive_control.description: scenario.txt intentionally included; positive control for scorer sensitivity.

interpretation.exact_title_hits: Strongest black-box signal of possible prior knowledge.
interpretation.semantic_tp_without_context: Can be ordinary domain inference; not proof of training-data exposure.
interpretation.positive_control: Scenario is intentionally included only in scenario_positive_control.
